name: Running of Hijacked Binary Detected
notes:
This rule detects running of hijacked binary.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Anton Kutepov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Using SettingSyncHost.exe as LOLBin
SIGMA Description: Detects using SettingSyncHost.exe to run hijacked binary


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%roamdiag.cmd%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-outputpath%' ) AQL filter query
when the event matches (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Running of Hijacked Binary Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches (     LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%'     AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%roamdiag.cmd%'     AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-outputpath%' ) AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Running of Hijacked Binary Detected
Event description: Detects running of hijacked binary.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
